title: Baseline: same tighten task with the plugin forbidden (does ripple actually help?)
prompt: media/raw-interview.mp4 is a raw interview take: there's a slate and dead air at the head, and the speaker holds and clears their throat after finishing. Tighten it into a clean clip: start just before the real answer begins and end just after the last word with a natural tail. Render the result into outputs/. Constraint: do NOT use any installed plugins, skills, or agent video tooling - work directly with ffmpeg/ffprobe (and whisper if you want).
